rationale: Bug hunt C9 clean (0 bugs in encounter_card_overlay.gd + screen_dither_layer.gd). Feature: the run loop had a HudController logic layer but NO visual HUD — players had zero feedback during 3D walks (no life bar, no currency, no ogham status). Created RunHudOverlay as a CRT-styled CanvasLayer and wired it into Run3DController lifecycle.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 10 code (run_hud_overlay.gd, run_3d_controller.gd wiring). Then: Pre-run ogham/rune selection screen — player picks 1 ogham before entering a biome. Currently hard-coded. Bible s.2.2: equip 1 ogham at run start.
